DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Bernard Maryanski (650-697-5524) specially appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party / Atty. Paul Sousa (415-543-8700) appearing for Defendant and moving party./

The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA AND RECONTRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with 10 Days LEAVE TO AMEND to address in good faith all issued raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Bautista, Not reported (D501)
